name: econresearch-agw
description: Economic research assistant for financial services teams — answers questions from live FRED data, with LLM and MCP traffic routed through Agentgateway.

skills.name: Economic Research
skills.description: Search and fetch live U.S. economic data series from FRED (via the fred_browse, fred_search, and fred_get_series MCP tools), with series IDs and observation dates cited.
